creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Here is the list that I show that have not been updated (at least per this PR).

This is a small enough list that IMHO we could easily just commit, and perhaps either restrict the GCC version in them or mark them BROKEN.

But I would like to request one more exp-run before I take that action.
